parameter.name: name
parameter.description: The Solace connection name to use.

parameter.name: queueName
parameter.description: Name of the queue to poll.

parameter.name: pollTimeout
parameter.description: Maximum time to wait for a message in milliseconds (default: 5000). SETTLEMENT: outside a transaction the message is acked on receipt and mediation failure loses it; inside beginTransaction the message is held until commit (ack) or rollback (redeliver).

parameter.name: selector
parameter.description: Optional JMS-style selector expression to filter messages (e.g., region = 'EU' AND priority > 5).

parameter.name: responseVariable
parameter.description: The name of the variable to which the result JSON is stored.

parameter.name: overwriteBody
parameter.description: If true, replace the message body with the polled message's payload.
